summary: Conservative live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected; all five hydrated refs are open, non-security PRs with useful focused changes, and this job does not allow merge, fix, raise_pr, instant close, or low-signal closeout.

actions.reason: Independent useful provider-failover PR; keep open for normal maintainer review/proof handling outside this inventory shard.

needs_human: #93378 requires maintainer technical judgment on whether the five-minute Telegram polling lease replacement is safe for healthy long-running monitors.
